source_pr.title: br/pkg/utils: stabilize task register tests
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #65726

Problem Summary:

`TestTaskRegisterFailedGrant` / `TestTaskRegisterFailedReput` were flaky because they used fixed sleeps while etcd lease keepalive/retry is asynchronous, and TTL queries can transiently fail during lease revoke/expiry.

### What changed and how does it work?

- Add `taskRegister.sleepRetryInterval` (with failpoint override) and use it in retry loops.
- Replace fixed sleeps with `require.Eventually`.
- Make `Close` and task listing tolerant to `lease not found` races.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
  - `make failpoint-enable && go test ./br/pkg/utils -run '^TestTaskRegister' -tags=intest`
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [x] The change is for stabilizing unit tests; CI will cover it.

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: skRegisterFailedGrant` / `TestTaskRegisterFailedReput` were flaky because they used fixed sleeps while etcd lease keepalive/retry is asynchronous
failure_signature: skRegisterFailedGrant` / `TestTaskRegisterFailedReput` were flaky because they used fixed sleeps while etcd lease keepalive/retry is asynchronous
fix_pattern: Add polling/wait (`Eventually`) for async conditions/cleanup to reduce timing-related flakiness.

evidence: evidence: skRegisterFailedGrant` / `TestTaskRegisterFailedReput` were flaky because they used fixed sleeps while etcd lease keepalive/retry is asynchronous
